# Michał Dziuba

## Summary
I am Michał Dziuba, a software developer and open-source enthusiast based in Poland. I have been coding since 2018. My work primarily focuses on building reliable applications for the web.

## Tech Stack
The main technologies I work with on a daily basis include:
- JavaScript & TypeScript
- Node.js & NestJS
- React.js & Next.js
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis
- Systems & Tools: Docker, Linux, C, C++

## Personal Interests
Outside of work, I spend my time:
- Gaming
- Listening to metal music
- Exploring history
- Pixel art

## Links & Details
- Blog: /blog
- Resume: /resume.pdf
